steps.title: Use the melanosome clue
steps.content: The passage says melanosomes produce pigment and have different shapes depending on the colors they produce. The scientists found melanosomes in a fossilized feather, so their shape can be used to infer the feather's original color.

steps.title: Apply the shape-color link
steps.content: A shifts to finding melanosomes in other fossils, C asks about preservation, and D would require fossils without the key evidence. The hypothesis uses melanosome appearance in the feather to determine the bird's colors. The answer is B.
